title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates:
Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Newgen Software Asia Pacific Associates!
